name: Syracuse Chamber Orchestra
tagline: Bringing live orchestral music to our community
mission: Inspiring the human spirit through music, unlocking the potential of one's creativity by giving career musicians, teachers, and working professionals the chance to perform and provide enjoyment for our community.
history: The Syracuse Chamber Orchestra is a newly-formed ensemble of local musicians who are professionals, para-professionals, and music teachers who want to perform and make music together. Supported in part by a grant from the CNY Community Arts program, the orchestra gave its inaugural concert on October 24, 2021 at the Onondaga Community College Recital Hall.

advertising.headline: Advertise with us
advertising.summary: Reach our concert audience and support live music in Central New York.
advertising.invite: We invite you to be part of the Syracuse Chamber Orchestra for our 2026–2027 season. When your business advertises with the SCO, you receive a full-color ad in each concert program and acknowledgement of your support on our website.
advertising.body: Our patrons will know you value and support music in our community, and the importance of live orchestral performances in Central New York. We hold at least two concerts each season; recent performances have drawn standing-room-only crowds.
advertising.cameraReadyNote: To place an ad, email us a camera-ready image of your advertisement, along with your name and business information. For a 1/3 page ad, a business card is sufficient.
advertising.donationNote: Prefer to support without advertising? You can make a donation instead.
